title: Creating a Dynamic Level-Analysis Panel in MQL5
subtitle: Single-Level Historical Probability — Touch/Breakout/Reversal Classification
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: MEDIUM EXTRACT — empirical level probability framework: bullish/bearish touch count, breakout vs reversal classification at any price level. Touch probability formula directly applicable to zone quality scoring.

core_concept.description: Given a user-defined price level, scan 500 bars. Count bullish touches (closed above after touch), bearish touches (closed below), bullish breakouts, bearish breakouts. Calculate empirical probabilities.
core_concept.touch_detection: High >= level - tolerance AND Low <= level + tolerance
core_concept.breakout_definition: prevClose crosses level AND currClose exceeds level by BreakPips
core_concept.bias_classification: Both touch AND breakout bullish dominate = SUPPORT; bearish = RESISTANCE; mixed = NEUTRAL

BreakPips.description: Pips beyond level to confirm breakout

keep: Bias classification: support vs resistance vs neutral based on historical touch behavior
Breakout vs reversal classification at each zone interaction
discard: Manual level input — use our automated zone levels
improve: Apply to our supply/demand zones: compute historical touch_prob for each zone automatically
Add touch_prob to zone quality score: zone with 75%+ bullish touch history = stronger demand zone
Track breakout_vs_reversal per zone: if zone has 60% breakout history, it may be failing soon
